requirements.text: Train control shall maintain safe separation between vehicles in adjacent zones.
Vital braking logic shall command emergency braking below the safe speed envelope.
Wayside interface shall support redundant signal input channels.
System headway shall remain under 110 seconds during peak operation.
Released software baseline shall include approved release notes and audit evidence.

changes.title: Update braking threshold for curve segment C
Wayside IO redundancy test failed on nightly build
Add audit checklist to release package

baselines.name: BL-2026.05-A
baselines.scope: Guideway database, signal plan, braking model, release notes

baselines.name: SW-BUILD-4517
baselines.scope: Vital Brake Module, CBTC Zone Controller, regression evidence

baselines.name: PROC-KIT-19
baselines.scope: Wayside IO components, supplier cybersecurity package, HSE checklist

A.title: Zone A - Terminal approach
A.details: Nominal headway: 105s. Interlocking clear. No active procurement blockers.

B.title: Zone B - Mainline segment
B.details: Nominal headway: 98s. Baseline aligned with current signal plan.

C.title: Zone C - Curved guideway
C.details: Braking threshold change under analysis. Linked to CHG-104 and FIT-BRK-022.

D.title: Zone D - Yard interface
D.details: Crossover coordinates verified. Awaiting documentation audit closure.
